title: El gallero
writer: Emilio Gómez Muriel, Estela Inda, Javier López Ferrer
actors: Tito Guízar, Rita Macedo, Ernesto Alonso
plot: In Michoacan in the 1920s, Gabriel, a young farmer and champion cockfighter, finds himself in violent opposition to Roman, who not only wants to beat Gabriel's fighting cock, but to steal Gabriel's wife Rosa.
